papers.title: Uneven Evolution of Cognition Across Generations of Generative AI Models
papers.reason: Excluded because it evaluates the cognitive abilities of generative AI models rather than cognition in human participants.

papers.title: ASR-Agnostic Multimodal Spectrotemporal Modeling for Early Dementia Detection
papers.reason: The paper develops a human dementia biomarker from elicited speech, but it lacks an interactive decision task, eye tracking, qualifying EEG analysis, and a cognitive process model.

papers.title: Demystifying Video Reasoning
papers.reason: Excluded because it studies reasoning and working memory inside diffusion-based video generation models rather than human cognition.

papers.title: The Richest Paradigm You're Not Using: Commercial Videogames at the Intersection of Human-Computer Interaction and Cognitive Science
papers.reason: The proposed methodology centers on interactive human videogame behavior and eye tracking, although it is a methodological perspective rather than a reported multimodal experiment.

papers.title: Pupillometry and Brain Dynamics for Cognitive Load in Working Memory
papers.reason: Human participants perform a sequential digit-span task while pupillometry is analyzed, but the EEG pipeline uses generic Catch-22 features rather than qualifying frequency-domain or connectivity analysis.

papers.title: Quant VideoGen: Auto-Regressive Long Video Generation via 2-Bit KV-Cache Quantization
papers.reason: Excluded because it concerns video generation and KV-cache memory in machine-learning models rather than human participants.

papers.title: Cognitive Load Estimation Using Brain Foundation Models and Interpretability for BCIs
papers.reason: The study addresses human cognitive-load monitoring with EEG, but reports foundation-model classification without a specified interactive paradigm, frequency-domain or connectivity analysis, eye tracking, or cognitive process model.

papers.title: Cross-Modal Computational Model of Brain-Heart Interactions via HRV and EEG Feature
papers.reason: The dataset includes a human working-memory task, but EEG is represented mainly by band-power and generic features while XGBoost and synthetic HRV generation do not constitute a cognitive generative model.

papers.title: Unveiling the Heart-Brain Connection: An Analysis of ECG in Cognitive Performance
papers.reason: The human working-memory paradigm supplies an interactive cognitive task, but the EEG analysis is limited to spectral and generic features and the XGBoost projection is not a cognitive process model.

papers.title: Your Eyes Controlled the Game: Real-Time Cognitive Training Adaptation based on Eye-Tracking and Physiological Data in Virtual Reality
papers.reason: The study combines interactive sustained-attention and working-memory training in virtual reality with eye tracking for real-time difficulty adaptation in human participants.
